headline: Nucor (NUE) Stock After Strong Rally And Recent Materials Sector Headlines
summary: If you are trying to work out whether Nucor stock still offers value at current levels, the starting point is understanding what today’s price is actually implying about the business. After a strong run with the share price up 41.5% year to date and 85.2% over the past year, the stock has recently cooled, with returns over the last 7 days and 30 days declining 1.7% and 2.7% respectively from a last close of US$239.78. Recent news coverage has focused on Nucor in the context of broader...
